unit.name: WP_Http external request blocking policy behavior
unit.public_contract: This fixture executes copied WordPress 7.0 WP_Http::block_request in isolated PHP CLI probes. It observes WP_HTTP_BLOCK_EXTERNAL, WP_ACCESSIBLE_HOSTS exact and wildcard allowlists, malformed URL blocking, localhost/site-host bypasses, and block_local_requests filtering without claiming live HTTP transport, Requests network I/O, DNS resolution, proxy/TLS behavior, installed distribution behavior, or generated public PHP ownership.

bridge.removal_gate: Replace copied public PHP with generated original-path adapters and pass external request blocking, selected upstream HTTP PHPUnit, installed distribution, and ecosystem HTTP policy gates before claiming public PHP ownership.
